title: Keppet Open Sports — catalog
description: Discovery entrypoint: one dataset entry per live sport pack, plus the history.deep clause. Zero-sport tolerant (datasets may be empty). Emitted by build/catalog.mjs.

updated.description: Stamped by writeJsonIfChanged only when content changes; null before first build.

deep.description: Human-readable note that full observation history + state series are private, offered separately.

cadence.description: Update cadence for the dataset (e.g. event).

schema.description: CDN URL of the per-event JSON Schema.

seasons.description: Season partitions present in the archive for this sport.

sources.description: Source ids backing this pack (graded in the license register).

attribution.description: Attribution strings auto-emitted from the register (OM §10.3 enforcement point 3).

coverage.description: Per-factor-family coverage declaration copied from the sport pack. The refusal/gap contract; see docs/02-observation-model.md §7.
